/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 2.2.7 -current_version 2.2.7 -o libfastcdr.2.2.7.dylib -install_name @rpath/libfastcdr.2.2.7.dylib CMakeFiles/fastcdr.dir/Cdr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastcdr.dir/CdrSizeCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastcdr.dir/FastCdr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastcdr.dir/FastBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastcdr.dir/exceptions/BadOptionalAccessException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastcdr.dir/exceptions/BadParamException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastcdr.dir/exceptions/Exception.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastcdr.dir/exceptions/LockedExternalAccessException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastcdr.dir/exceptions/NotEnoughMemoryException.cpp.o
